message:
JSON stringify: Add inline to writeEscapedStringDirect

Minor optimization: inline escape function to reduce call overhead.

Performance: 1.21-1.25x slower than Rust (best: 1.10x!)
Previous: 1.24-1.27x

Journey complete: 7.13x slower → 1.21x slower
Total improvement: 5.9x faster! 🚀

Tried and reverted in final session:
- SIMD escape detection: worse (1.35x)
- ensureUnusedCapacity + @memcpy: worse (1.38x)
- 10% safety buffer: worse (1.33x)

Final gap to #1: ~100ms (17%)
